items.text: I just ordered a bag of food grade citric acid to try it.  My shower area never gets too bad as I do squeegee it after every shower.   I use vinegar, water and dish detergent currently for weekly cleaning and it is fine I just don't like the smell.

It would be great to get this into my water heater as I have hard water. I have a machine I bought that makes distilled water and it came with a small bag of citric acid. I purchased a larger bag to clean my machine as I wanted to make alot instead of purchasing. A strange note, my kidney specialist because I had 3 sessions of kidney stones every 4 years. It's been 7 years since I had my last. My doctor told me I lacked Citrate.  So I take 6, 1080 mg of potassium Citrate tablets a day. I am curious if there is a connection.

Thanks. I would have used an affiliate link if you had one. As it is, thanks for the Amazon links and for including the US.I did have to chuckle at the lemon smell indicating clean. I suppose for a lot of folks that's true
